_comment: Per-user data keyed by exact Cloudflare email (== Shelfmark folder == Calibre-Web username == userprefs filename basis). GREETING: a user may have 'greetings' (a list — one is picked at RANDOM each page load), OR a single 'greeting' string, OR neither (falls back to defaultGreeting with {name}). {name} is substituted in any of them. 'shelf'/'tag' drive Kindle sync.

users.name: Rob
greetings: Welcome back, boss.
The library awaits, {name}.
What are we reading today, {name}?
Good to see you again.
Back for more, are we?

users.name: Rob W
greetings: Wise guys realise....
Get stewed
My life is a delicate balance
Still buyable
There's more to life than books
In my view she hadn't even read the thing.
I had a bad reaction to your feared public hobby writings
I get no satisfaction from your very recent sightings
I'm not feeling your buzz, I only smell your crack of stew
She had some beauty of manners, but she looked like a bug
Migrations of their type are such good planners and not smug
You are proselytizing alone, listening to the voice with your ears
You have regurgitated the tone, now sat in your tract for many years
I lost my temper with a friend
Mocked him and treated him with rudeness
Of my own making, I walk a dark corridor over my heart
Hoping one day a door will be ajar
In vulgar and arrogant abeyance
J. McCarthy, approximately ten-fifteen days
I got down, I was depressed
Turn the radio on
To cheer myself up
Put the radio on, get the magazine out
Checklist, I never leave home without
Three, Palm Pilot
It's my lifeline
I think it's my P.A.'s computer
She rules my diary and I download it
Four, mobile phone
Five, Amex card
I was in the realm of the essence of Tong
What you've done is Ignoramus 103
I know you called, I know you called
I know all about the warehouse fire
I know squirrelys didn't chew the wires
Three people have my number, the other two were with me
I don't like to tattle-tale but I'm not your patsy
This reads like some dork Inside Edition, Hard Copy
I can't be your character witness, I can't be your alibi
Doorbell rings, it's the FBI, we learned Spy vs. Spy
You, my friend, are guilty as can be
I know you hung up my line

users.name: Beccy
greetings: Hello my love.
Hello pops

users.name: Alice
greetings: Alice is so great.

users.name: Violet
greetings: Violet is so great.
